blog.description: Engineering notes from the AACsearch team
blog.title: AACsearch Blog

changelog.description: What shipped, when, and what changed under the hood.
changelog.title: Changelog

contact.description: Reach the team — billing, security disclosures, partnerships.

notifications.error: Could not send your message. Please try again later.
notifications.success: Got it — we'll reply within one business day.

contact.title: Contact

hero.title: Search your users actually feel.
hero.subtitle: A hosted search API with org-scoped tokens, per-key origin allow-lists, rate-limit and quota — built so you ship search instead of running infra.

step1.title: 1. Push documents
step1.description: POST your records to a per-org index. Bulk import or single-doc upsert — schema is whatever you send.

step2.title: 2. Mint a search token
step2.description: Issue a short-lived scoped token from your dashboard or server. Locked to an index, an origin, a TTL.

step3.title: 3. Search from the browser
step3.description: Use the typed browser SDK. Single search, multi-search (federated), faceted filters — under 50ms p99.

features.title: What you actually get
features.subtitle: No mystery boxes. Every feature here is shipping today.

scopedTokens.title: Scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: Per-user, per-filter, TTL-bound. Mint server-side, ship to the browser, expire on schedule.

originAllowlist.title: Origin allow-list
originAllowlist.description: Pin every key to specific origins. A leaked key from Twitter doesn't drain your quota.

rateLimitQuota.title: Rate limit & quota
rateLimitQuota.description: Per-key per-minute throttling and per-org monthly quota — both visible in the dashboard before you hit them.

multiSearch.title: Multi-search
multiSearch.description: Run several queries in one round-trip. Build cross-collection autocomplete without N requests.

reindex.title: Zero-downtime reindex
reindex.description: Rebuild an index against a new schema while live traffic keeps hitting the old one. Cut over atomically.

selfHost.title: One self-host path
selfHost.description: Same code as managed cloud. Helm chart and Docker compose, no proprietary server fork.

pricing.title: Pay for searches and indexed docs. Nothing else.
pricing.subtitle: 1 search-unit = 1 search request OR 1 indexed document. Cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: For evaluating, hobby projects and side-products.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Production-ready for indie SaaS and small B2B teams.

cta.title: Ready to ship search?
cta.subtitle: Free tier covers most side-projects. No credit card.

featuresPage.title: Every feature you need to ship search
featuresPage.description: Scoped tokens, origin allow-lists, rate limiting, multi-search, zero-downtime reindex — all shipping today.

pricingPage.title: Simple, usage-based pricing
pricingPage.description: Pay for searches and indexed documents. Nothing else. No seat fees, no hidden limits. Cancel anytime.

integrationsPage.title: Connect AACsearch to your stack
integrationsPage.description: Pre-built modules for popular platforms. REST API and Browser SDK for everything else.

integrations.title: Ready-made integrations
integrations.subtitle: Install in minutes. Sync automatically. Search instantly.

prestashop.title: PrestaShop 8.x
prestashop.description: Drop-in PHP module. Syncs products, categories, and stock automatically on every save.

bitrix.title: 1C-Bitrix
bitrix.description: Native Bitrix module. Event-driven product export with full catalog support.

restApi.title: REST API
restApi.description: 15 public endpoints with API-key auth. Works with any backend language or platform.

browserSdk.title: Browser SDK
browserSdk.description: Typed JavaScript client. Single search, federated multi-search, facets — under 50 ms p99.

mcpServer.title: MCP Server
mcpServer.description: Model Context Protocol integration for Claude, Cursor, and other AI agents.

custom.title: Custom connector
custom.description: 7-endpoint Connector API lets you build a sync for any data source in any language.

securityPage.title: Security built into every layer
securityPage.description: API keys hashed and never stored in plaintext. Scoped tokens that narrow, never widen. Tenant isolation enforced at every query.

security.title: Defense in depth
security.subtitle: Every request goes through auth, rate limiting, quota check, and tenant isolation before touching your data.

keyHashing.title: API key hashing
keyHashing.description: All API keys are hashed with SHA-256 and stored as digests. The plaintext is shown once at creation and never again.

scopedTokens.title: Scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: HMAC-signed tokens are locked to a specific index, origin, and TTL. They narrow permissions — never widen them.

originAllowlist.title: Origin allow-list
originAllowlist.description: Pin every API key to specific origins. A leaked key published on Twitter still can't drain your quota.

rateLimiting.title: Rate limiting
rateLimiting.description: Per-key per-minute throttling, enforced server-side. Usage and limits are visible in the dashboard before you hit them.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant isolation
tenantIsolation.description: Every search call is scoped to your organization ID. Cross-org reads are architecturally impossible — not just policy.

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: Every admin action is logged with timestamp, actor, and change. Available on Enterprise plans.

useCasesPage.title: Search for every product and team
useCasesPage.description: From e-commerce storefronts to internal tools — AACsearch adapts to your data model and your team's scale.

useCases.title: Built for your use case
useCases.subtitle: One API, many shapes. Bring your data — AACsearch handles the indexing, ranking, and delivery.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce product search
ecommerce.description: Faceted filters, synonym expansion, zero-results handling, and per-user scoped tokens — all in a single search call.

helpCenter.title: Help center & docs
helpCenter.description: Index your knowledge base and surface relevant articles in milliseconds. Pair with the Knowledge module for Q&A over PDFs.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant SaaS
multiTenant.description: One AACsearch index per tenant, scoped tokens per end-user. Your customers never see each other's data — by design.

devTools.title: Developer tools
devTools.description: Semantic search over code, configs, and logs. MCP Server lets your AI agents search and update indexes programmatically.

internalTools.title: Internal tools
internalTools.description: Fast search over CRM records, inventory, employee directories, or any internal dataset your team queries daily.

contentSites.title: Content sites
contentSites.description: Instant search for blogs, changelogs, and documentation. The Browser SDK drops into any front end in under an hour.

enterprisePage.title: AACsearch for Enterprise
enterprisePage.description: Dedicated infrastructure, SSO, audit log, 99.95% SLA, and signed DPA — everything compliance and security teams require.

enterprise.title: Built for regulated teams
enterprise.subtitle: Unmetered search, dedicated cluster, custom integrations. Contact us and we'll scope a plan for your requirements.

sso.title: SSO (SAML / OIDC)
sso.description: Connect your identity provider — Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, or any SAML 2.0 / OIDC compliant IdP.

dedicatedCluster.title: Dedicated cluster
dedicatedCluster.description: Your indexes run on isolated infrastructure in the region you choose. No noisy neighbours, no shared search nodes.

auditLog.title: Audit log + IP allow-list
auditLog.description: Every admin action is timestamped and attributable. Lock access to a specific IP range for your ops team.

sla.title: 99.95% SLA + signed DPA
sla.description: Contractual uptime guarantee and a signed Data Processing Agreement covering GDPR and CCPA requirements.

prioritySupport.title: Priority support
prioritySupport.description: Dedicated Slack channel. Sub-4-hour first response. Named technical account manager for onboarding and incidents.

customIntegrations.title: Custom integrations
customIntegrations.description: We onboard your CMS, ERP, or proprietary data source. Connector API included; custom connectors on request.

aboutPage.title: About AACsearch
aboutPage.description: We're building the search infrastructure for the next generation of web applications.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.quote: Search should be fast, relevant, and accessible to every developer.
mission.body: AACsearch was founded with a simple belief: great search should not require a team of engineers to maintain or a fortune to operate.

speed.title: Blazing Fast
speed.description: Sub-50ms search responses at any scale, powered by our distributed search infrastructure.

simple.title: Developer First
simple.description: Intuitive REST API, SDKs for every major language, and a dashboard that makes sense.

open.title: Transparent Pricing
open.description: No hidden fees, no lock-in. Pay only for what you use with clear, predictable pricing.

about.title: Why we built AACsearch
about.subtitle: Search infrastructure is hard. Managed services are expensive and opaque. We built the thing we wished existed.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Make production-grade search available to every team — from two-person startups to regulated enterprises — without requiring a dedicated search engineer.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Built on Typesense, a fast open-source search engine. We add multi-tenancy, API key management, analytics, and a hosted control plane on top.

openCore.title: Open core
openCore.description: The server code is open source. Inspect what runs, self-host on your infrastructure, or use our managed cloud. No proprietary fork, no lock-in.

team.title: Team
team.description: A small, focused team. We have shipped search at B2B SaaS companies, e-commerce platforms, and developer tools. We eat our own cooking.

values.title: Values
values.description: Simplicity over cleverness. Documented behaviour over magic. An API that a junior developer can use on day one and a senior can rely on in production.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: Public roadmap, voted by users. We ship incrementally — no big-bang releases. Changelog updated with every deployment.

customersPage.title: Loved by Developers, Trusted by Businesses
customersPage.description: Join hundreds of companies using AACsearch to power fast, relevant search experiences.

first.quote: AACsearch cut our search latency by 80% and our team set it up in an afternoon. It just works.
first.author: Sarah Chen

second.quote: We migrated from a legacy search provider and saw immediate improvements in relevance. Our conversion rate went up 15%.
second.author: Marcus Weber

third.quote: The API is clean, the docs are great, and the support team actually responds. Rare combination.
third.author: Priya Sharma

cta.title: Join hundreds of companies
cta.description: Start your free trial today — no credit card required.

customers.title: Trusted by builders
customers.subtitle: Early adopters who replaced Algolia, Elasticsearch, or hand-rolled solutions — and stopped worrying about search infra.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce platform
ecommerce.description: Replaced Algolia after the third surprise bill. AACsearch costs a fixed amount each month. The migration took three days. Search is better than before.

saasFounder.title: B2B SaaS founder
saasFounder.description: We needed per-tenant search without building infra. AACsearch scoped tokens meant we shipped in a weekend instead of a sprint.

devTools.title: Developer tools company
devTools.description: MCP Server lets our AI features search over user data programmatically. One integration unlocked three new product features.

enterprise.title: Enterprise platform
enterprise.description: Audit log, SSO, and dedicated cluster were the requirements. AACsearch Enterprise checked all three. The SLA is contractual.

marketplace.title: Marketplace startup
marketplace.description: Multi-search lets us run product, seller, and content queries in one request. The analytics show us exactly where users drop off.

agency.title: Digital agency
agency.description: We deploy AACsearch for clients. The self-host path means clients who need on-prem get the same product as cloud customers.

roadmapPage.title: Product roadmap
roadmapPage.description: What shipped, what is in progress, and what is coming next. Updated after every sprint.

roadmap.title: Where we are going
roadmap.subtitle: Incremental, public, and boring in the best way. No big-bang releases — just consistent delivery.

searchCore.title: Search core v0.x
searchCore.description: Single-doc upsert, multi-search, browser SDK, scoped tokens, origin allow-list, rate-limit, quota, zero-downtime reindex, DB-first ingest.

marketing.title: Marketing site v0.5
marketing.description: Public marketing site with pricing, features, integrations, security, use-cases, and enterprise pages in 5 locales.

connectors.title: CMS connectors R2
connectors.description: PrestaShop 8.x and 1C-Bitrix modules. Connector API with handshake, full/delta sync, diagnostics, heartbeat.

knowledge.title: Knowledge module R2.5
knowledge.description: RAG and GraphRAG over documents. 9 oRPC procedures, 7 Prisma models, file ingestion, chunking, retrieval.

metering.title: Search-units metering v0.6
metering.description: Tochka wallet top-up, per-plan search-unit billing, analytics pipeline, wallet dashboard.

docs.title: Public docs site v0.7
docs.description: Full documentation site with API reference, quick-start guides, and tutorials.

selfHost.title: Self-host quickstart v1.0
selfHost.description: Helm chart, Docker Compose, one-click deploy to Coolify. Same code as managed cloud.

vectorSearch.title: Vector & hybrid search
vectorSearch.description: Semantic search via OpenAI embeddings. Hybrid BM25 + vector ranking. Already implemented in procedures.

careersPage.title: Careers at AACsearch
careersPage.description: A small team building search infrastructure for the next generation of software products. Remote-first.

careers.title: Work on search infrastructure
careers.subtitle: Small team, meaningful work. Every engineer ships to production. No committees, no sprints that miss.
careers.noRoles: No open roles right now — but we are always interested in exceptional candidates.

culture.title: Culture
culture.description: Remote-first, async-default. We write things down. Meetings are rare and have agendas. Results over hours.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: TypeScript, Next.js, Typesense, Prisma, Hono. The stack is modern and documented. You will own features end-to-end.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We are early. You will have outsized impact. The codebase is clean — no legacy debt to wade through.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.description: Competitive salary benchmarked to your location. Equity. Home office budget. No micromanagement.

learning.title: Learning
learning.description: Conference budget. Paid books and courses. Time to explore new ideas that serve the product.

hiring.title: Hiring process
hiring.description: Two calls and a paid take-home. We respect your time. Decision in under two weeks from first contact.

partnersPage.title: Partner with AACsearch
partnersPage.description: Grow your business by integrating, reselling, or building on top of AACsearch. Join our partner ecosystem.

partners.title: Grow with AACsearch
partners.subtitle: We are looking for agencies, consultants, and technology companies who want to embed search into their offerings.

technology.title: Technology partners
technology.description: Build native integrations for your platform. Co-marketing, joint documentation, and technical support.

implementation.title: Implementation partners
implementation.description: Agencies and consultants who implement AACsearch for their clients. Revenue sharing and deal registration.

reseller.title: Resellers
reseller.description: Resell AACsearch under your own brand or bundle it into your product. White-label options available.

cloud.title: Cloud marketplace
cloud.description: Available on AWS Marketplace and Azure Marketplace. Transact via your existing cloud commitment.

benefits.title: Partner benefits
benefits.description: Partner portal, co-marketing support, dedicated channel manager, NFR licenses, and priority support SLA.

apply.title: Apply to the program
apply.description: Fill in the form and a partner manager will respond within two business days. No exclusivity required.

featuresSearchApiPage.title: Search API
featuresSearchApiPage.description: A simple, powerful REST API for lightning-fast search over your data. Tenant-isolated, rate-limited, and observable.

featuresSearchApi.title: The API your team deserves
featuresSearchApi.subtitle: 15 REST endpoints. OpenAPI 3.1 spec. Browser SDK. No Typesense cluster to manage.

endpoints.title: 15 public endpoints
endpoints.description: Full CRUD over indexes, documents, and API keys. Plus search, multi-search, analytics, and OpenAPI spec at /api/v1/openapi.json.

openApi.title: OpenAPI 3.1 spec
openApi.description: Machine-readable spec ships with every deployment. Generate clients in any language. Type-safe from day one.

browserSdk.title: Typed browser SDK
browserSdk.description: NPM package. Single search, multi-search (federated), facets. Under 50ms p99. Works in any framework.

authentication.title: API key authentication
authentication.description: Bearer token auth. Keys hashed at rest. Scoped tokens for browser use. Origin allow-list per key.

tenancy.title: Built-in multi-tenancy
tenancy.description: Every request is isolated to your organization. Cross-org reads are architecturally impossible — not just policy.

observability.title: Observability built in
observability.description: Every search is recorded with query, result count, latency, and user agent. Analytics and top-queries in the dashboard.

featuresAnalyticsPage.title: Search analytics
featuresAnalyticsPage.description: Understand what your users search for, what returns no results, and what drives conversions — all in the dashboard.

featuresAnalytics.title: Turn searches into insights
featuresAnalytics.subtitle: Every query is an implicit user intent signal. AACsearch captures, aggregates, and surfaces them automatically.

topQueries.title: Top queries
topQueries.description: See the most frequent search terms ranked by volume. Spot trends, emerging demand, and seasonal patterns.

zeroResults.title: Zero-results tracking
zeroResults.description: Every search that returns nothing is flagged. Build synonyms, add missing content, or surface alternatives.

clickThrough.title: Click-through rate
clickThrough.description: Track which results users click per query. Identify ranking problems before they hurt conversion.

recentActivity.title: Recent activity feed
recentActivity.description: Live feed of search events across your org. Filter by index, date range, or result count.

usageSummary.title: Usage summary
usageSummary.description: Monthly search-unit consumption, broken down by index. Forecast costs and plan capacity before hitting limits.

widgetEvents.title: Widget event tracking
widgetEvents.description: widget_open, search_query, result_click, filter_used — all captured automatically from the embeddable widget.

featuresWidgetPage.title: Embeddable search widget
featuresWidgetPage.description: A 14KB JavaScript widget with Shadow DOM isolation. Drop it into any storefront or website in under an hour.

featuresWidget.title: Search that drops into any page
featuresWidget.subtitle: Vanilla JS, no framework dependency, served from your AACsearch subdomain. Works on PrestaShop, Bitrix, WordPress, and custom storefronts.

shadowDom.title: Shadow DOM isolation
shadowDom.description: Widget styles never leak into your page. Your page styles never break the widget. Zero CSS conflicts.

noFramework.title: No framework required
noFramework.description: Pure JavaScript IIFE. Works alongside React, Vue, plain HTML, or any CMS. No build step, no npm, no bundler.

i18n.title: 5-locale built-in
i18n.description: English, German, Spanish, French, and Russian translations built into the widget bundle. Auto-detects locale.

analytics.title: Analytics out of the box
analytics.description: Tracks widget_open, search_query, zero_results, result_click, and filter_used automatically. No extra code.

config.title: Data-attribute config
config.description: Configure via data-* attributes on the script tag. No JavaScript required. Token, placeholder, locale — all attributes.

performance.title: 14KB gzipped
performance.description: IIFE + ESM dual build. Fast initial load, instant search results. No async chunks, no dynamic imports.

featuresKnowledgePage.title: Knowledge base & RAG
featuresKnowledgePage.description: Index your documents and answer questions over them with AI. Chunking, retrieval, and GraphRAG — included.

featuresKnowledge.title: Q&A over your documents
featuresKnowledge.subtitle: Upload PDFs, DOCX, and text files. Ask questions in natural language. Get cited answers backed by your content.

ingestion.title: Multi-format ingestion
ingestion.description: PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown. Upload via the dashboard or the ingest-file API. Status tracked per ingestion job.

chunking.title: Smart chunking
chunking.description: Documents are split into semantic chunks with overlap. Chunk size and strategy configurable per knowledge space.

retrieval.title: Semantic retrieval
retrieval.description: OpenAI embeddings for semantic similarity. BM25 for keyword precision. Hybrid scoring for best-of-both results.

graphRag.title: GraphRAG
graphRag.description: Entity extraction builds a knowledge graph over your documents. Multi-hop reasoning surfaces connections plain search misses.

citations.title: Cited answers
citations.description: Every answer includes source references with document name, chunk position, and relevance score.

multiTenant.title: Per-tenant spaces
multiTenant.description: Each org has isolated knowledge spaces. Users only see their own data. No cross-tenant information leakage.

featuresConnectorsPage.title: CMS connectors
featuresConnectorsPage.description: Native modules for PrestaShop and 1C-Bitrix. REST API for everything else. Sync products and content automatically.

featuresConnectors.title: Connect your data source
featuresConnectors.subtitle: Pre-built modules handle the sync loop. The 7-endpoint Connector API lets you write a connector in any language.

prestashop.title: PrestaShop 8.x
prestashop.description: PHP module. Event hooks on product save, update, and delete. Full catalog export with one click.

bitrix.title: 1C-Bitrix
bitrix.description: Native Bitrix module. Background agent for scheduled sync. Event handlers for real-time updates.

connectorApi.title: Connector API
connectorApi.description: 7 endpoints: handshake, full sync, delta sync, delete, diagnostics, sync status, heartbeat. Build your own in any language.

fullSync.title: Full & delta sync
fullSync.description: Full sync re-indexes the entire catalog. Delta sync processes only changed records. Schedule or trigger on demand.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics endpoint
diagnostics.description: Test the connection, check index state, and verify token permissions without touching production data.

syncJobs.title: Sync job history
syncJobs.description: Every sync run is logged with start time, document count, errors, and duration. Retry failed batches from the dashboard.

featuresScopedTokensPage.title: Scoped search tokens
featuresScopedTokensPage.description: HMAC-signed tokens that narrow permissions to a specific index, user, TTL, and filter — never widen them.

featuresScopedTokens.title: Fine-grained access control
featuresScopedTokens.subtitle: Issue a token server-side, ship it to the browser. It expires, it is locked to one index, and it can only AND-narrow the result set.

hmacSigning.title: HMAC-signed
hmacSigning.description: Tokens are signed with your secret. Tampering or replay is cryptographically detectable.

ttl.title: TTL-bound
ttl.description: Every scoped token carries an expiry. Short-lived tokens for browser sessions; longer TTLs for server-to-server.

filters.title: AND-combined filters
filters.description: A token can carry a mandatory filter (e.g. userId = 42). The server AND-combines it with the caller's filter — never OR.

originLock.title: Origin locking
originLock.description: Pin a token to specific origins. A token exported in JavaScript can only be used from your domain.

indexScope.title: Index-scoped
indexScope.description: Each token is bound to a single index. Cross-index queries require a separate token per index.

serverSide.title: Server-side issuance
serverSide.description: Tokens are issued by your backend via a single API call. The browser never sees your admin API key.

featuresMultiSearchPage.title: Multi-search & federated queries
featuresMultiSearchPage.description: Run multiple searches across different indexes in one HTTP request. Build cross-collection autocomplete under 50ms.

featuresMultiSearch.title: One request, many results
featuresMultiSearch.subtitle: Federated search across indexes, collections, and data types — without N round-trips from the browser.

federation.title: Cross-index federation
federation.description: Query products, categories, and blog posts in one call. Merge and rank results client-side or let the API do it.

autocomplete.title: Autocomplete
autocomplete.description: Type-ahead suggestions across multiple collections in one request. Under 50ms p99 for instant feel.

batchedRequests.title: Batched requests
batchedRequests.description: Up to 50 searches per multi-search request. Each with independent filters, sort, and facets.

parallelExecution.title: Parallel execution
parallelExecution.description: All searches in a multi-search call execute in parallel on the server. Total latency = slowest single query.

independentFacets.title: Independent facets
independentFacets.description: Each search in the batch returns its own facet counts. Build multi-panel faceted UIs without extra requests.

singleToken.title: Single token
singleToken.description: One scoped token authorizes all searches in the batch. Tenant isolation is enforced per query inside the batch.

featuresReindexPage.title: Zero-downtime reindex
featuresReindexPage.description: Rebuild your index against a new schema while live traffic keeps hitting the old one. Cut over atomically.

featuresReindex.title: Schema changes without downtime
featuresReindex.subtitle: Version your indexes. Rebuild in the background. Swap the alias when ready. Rollback in one command.

versioning.title: Versioned indexes
versioning.description: Every index has a version number (e.g. org_products_v3). Aliases point to the active version transparently.

aliasSwap.title: Atomic alias swap
aliasSwap.description: Reindex into a new version while traffic hits the old. Swap the alias in a single atomic operation — zero dropped requests.

backgroundRebuild.title: Background rebuild
backgroundRebuild.description: Reindex runs out of band. Your API continues serving search from the current version throughout.

rollback.title: One-command rollback
rollback.description: If the new version has issues, point the alias back to the previous version. Traffic shifts instantly.

schemaChanges.title: Schema evolution
schemaChanges.description: Add fields, change types, update facet settings — all handled by creating a new version, not mutating the live index.

verification.title: Built-in verification
verification.description: After reindex, run a verification query before the alias swap. Catch missing documents before users notice.

featuresRateLimitingPage.title: Rate limiting & quota
featuresRateLimitingPage.description: Per-key per-minute throttling and per-org monthly quota. Both visible in the dashboard before you hit them.

featuresRateLimiting.title: Protect your budget and your service
featuresRateLimiting.subtitle: Configurable limits at every layer. You control what happens when limits are reached.

perKeyThrottling.title: Per-key throttling
perKeyThrottling.description: Set requests-per-minute per API key. Burst traffic from one key does not affect others on your account.

orgQuota.title: Monthly org quota
orgQuota.description: Hard limit on search-units per month per organization. Configurable per plan. Dashboard shows usage in real time.

graceful429.title: Graceful 429 responses
graceful429.description: Rate-limited requests return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header. The browser SDK handles retries automatically.

dashboardVisibility.title: Dashboard visibility
dashboardVisibility.description: Current usage, limit, and projected end-of-month consumption visible at a glance. No surprise overages.

planBased.title: Plan-based limits
planBased.description: Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans carry different quotas and rate limits. Upgrade without touching your integration.

gracePeriod.title: Cancellation grace period
gracePeriod.description: 7-day read-only grace on cancellation. Search keeps working while you migrate. Writes are blocked after cancellation.

featuresSelfHostPage.title: Self-hosting AACsearch
featuresSelfHostPage.description: Run AACsearch on your own infrastructure. Same code as managed cloud. Helm chart and Docker Compose included.

featuresSelfHost.title: Your infrastructure, your rules
featuresSelfHost.subtitle: One codebase for managed cloud and self-hosted. No proprietary server fork. No vendor lock-in.

openSource.title: Open source core
openSource.description: The full server code is open source. Inspect every line, audit every dependency, fork if you must.

dockerCompose.title: Docker Compose
dockerCompose.description: One command to start Postgres, MinIO, and AACsearch locally. Identical to the managed cloud architecture.

helmChart.title: Helm chart
helmChart.description: Production Kubernetes deployment via Helm. Values file for resource limits, replicas, and storage class.

coolify.title: Coolify one-click
coolify.description: Deploy to Coolify with a single click. Environment variables pre-filled from your config.

noFork.title: No proprietary fork
noFork.description: Self-hosted and cloud run the same binary from the same repository. Features ship to both simultaneously.

support.title: Self-host support
support.description: Community support via GitHub for free tier. Enterprise self-host includes dedicated support and SLA.

useCasesEcommercePage.title: Search for e-commerce
useCasesEcommercePage.description: Faceted filters, synonym expansion, zero-results handling, and real-time analytics — built for product catalogs.

useCasesEcommerce.title: Product search that converts
useCasesEcommerce.subtitle: Connect your catalog with the PrestaShop or Bitrix module. Live in an afternoon. Analytics from day one.

facetedFilter.title: Faceted filtering
facetedFilter.description: Brand, category, price range, availability, attributes — any field in your schema becomes a facet. No extra config.

synonyms.title: Synonym expansion
synonyms.description: Add synonyms in the dashboard. TV → television, sofa → couch. Users find products with natural language.

zeroResults.title: Zero-results handling
zeroResults.description: AACsearch tracks every no-result query. Use the list to add synonyms, products, or fallback suggestions.

prestaShop.title: PrestaShop module
prestaShop.description: Drop-in PHP module. Syncs on every product save, update, and delete. Full catalog export with one click.

analytics.title: Conversion analytics
analytics.description: Track CTR per query, top search terms, and filter usage. Identify ranking issues before they hurt revenue.

widget.title: Drop-in widget
widget.description: 14KB widget for your storefront. No build step, no npm. Works alongside your existing theme.

useCasesSaasPage.title: Search for multi-tenant SaaS
useCasesSaasPage.description: One AACsearch index per tenant, scoped tokens per end-user. Your customers never see each other's data.

useCasesSaas.title: Search isolation built in
useCasesSaas.subtitle: Tenant isolation is architectural — not just policy. Each org gets its own index, its own quota, its own keys.

tenantIsolation.title: Per-tenant indexes
tenantIsolation.description: Create one index per customer organization. Data never mingles. Deleting a tenant deletes their index.

scopedTokens.title: Per-user scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: Issue tokens server-side that lock to a userId filter. Your end-users search only their own records.

multiIndex.title: Multi-index per tenant
multiIndex.description: Up to 10 indexes per org on Pro. Products, orders, tickets, docs — separate indexes, one dashboard.

quota.title: Per-tenant quota
quota.description: Track search-unit consumption per tenant. Attribute costs to customers. Bill accordingly.

orpc.title: oRPC management API
orpc.description: Programmatically create indexes, rotate keys, and pull analytics per tenant from your backend.

reindex.title: Schema evolution
reindex.description: Evolve your data model without downtime. Reindex each tenant in the background, swap aliases atomically.

useCasesHelpCenterPage.title: Search for help centers & docs
useCasesHelpCenterPage.description: Index your knowledge base and surface relevant articles in milliseconds. Pair with the Knowledge module for AI Q&A.

useCasesHelpCenter.title: Help users help themselves
useCasesHelpCenter.subtitle: Instant article search, zero-results tracking, and AI Q&A over PDFs — one integration, no search engineer required.

articleSearch.title: Instant article search
articleSearch.description: Full-text search over your help articles with typo tolerance and ranking by relevance. Results in under 50ms.

knowledgeRag.title: AI Q&A (RAG)
knowledgeRag.description: Users ask a question in natural language. The Knowledge module retrieves relevant chunks and generates a cited answer.

zeroResults.title: Zero-results intelligence
zeroResults.description: Every unanswered query is logged. Surface gaps in your documentation before customers escalate to support.

multilingual.title: Multilingual support
multilingual.description: Index content in multiple languages. Search in the user's locale. Synonym libraries per language.

widget.title: Drop-in search widget
widget.description: Add search to any help center in under an hour. Works on Docusaurus, GitBook, Notion, or custom portals.

analytics.title: Search analytics
analytics.description: Top queries, zero-results, and CTR show you what users actually look for — not what you think they do.

useCasesDevToolsPage.title: Search for developer tools
useCasesDevToolsPage.description: Semantic search over code, configs, and logs. MCP Server lets AI agents search and update indexes programmatically.

useCasesDevTools.title: Search built for developers
useCasesDevTools.subtitle: REST API, typed SDK, MCP Server, and an oRPC control plane. No GUI required — automate everything.

restApi.title: Full REST API
restApi.description: 15 endpoints, OpenAPI 3.1 spec, API key auth. Integrate from any language, any CI pipeline, any infra.

mcp.title: MCP Server for AI agents
mcp.description: Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client can search, list indexes, upsert documents, and pull stats programmatically.

semanticSearch.title: Semantic search
semanticSearch.description: OpenAI embeddings over code comments, configs, and logs. Find relevant entries even with different terminology.

typedSdk.title: Typed browser SDK
typedSdk.description: NPM package with full TypeScript types. Integrate in your dev tool's front end without guessing API shapes.

selfHost.title: Self-hostable
selfHost.description: Run AACsearch in your infrastructure. Air-gapped deployment for security-sensitive developer tools.

orpcControl.title: Programmatic control plane
orpcControl.description: Create indexes, rotate keys, trigger reindex, and pull analytics from your build pipeline or deployment scripts.

useCasesContentSitesPage.title: Search for content sites
useCasesContentSitesPage.description: Instant search for blogs, changelogs, and documentation. The Browser SDK drops into any front end in under an hour.

useCasesContentSites.title: Content search that keeps readers
useCasesContentSites.subtitle: Blog posts, changelogs, documentation, landing pages — indexed and searchable from day one.

contentIndexing.title: Index anything
contentIndexing.description: MDX, Markdown, HTML, JSON feeds — any content format that produces structured records can be indexed.

instantSearch.title: Instant search UI
instantSearch.description: Results appear as the user types. Typo tolerance, highlight matching text, deep-link to anchor sections.

browserSdk.title: Browser SDK
browserSdk.description: Drop the typed SDK into your Next.js, Astro, Nuxt, or static site. One component, instant results.

changelog.title: Changelog search
changelog.description: Developers search changelogs to find when a behaviour changed. Index changelog entries and let them find it in seconds.

multilingual.title: Multilingual content
multilingual.description: Index content per locale. Serve results in the user's language. Synonym libraries tuned per locale.

seo.title: SEO-friendly
seo.description: Search is client-side — no server rendering required. Your static pages stay statically generated.

integrationsPrestashopPage.title: PrestaShop integration
integrationsPrestashopPage.description: Native PrestaShop 8.x module for AACsearch. Sync your product catalog automatically on every save.

integrationsPrestashop.title: AACsearch for PrestaShop
integrationsPrestashop.subtitle: Drop-in PHP module. No API coding required. Full catalog sync, real-time updates, and the search widget in minutes.

install.title: One-click install
install.description: Upload the ZIP in your PrestaShop module manager. Enter your connector token. Done.

autoSync.title: Automatic sync
autoSync.description: Product saves, updates, and deletes trigger instant sync via PrestaShop event hooks. No cron needed.

fullExport.title: Full catalog export
fullExport.description: Initial export of all products and categories with one click in the module admin panel.

widget.title: Widget embed
widget.description: Enable the AACsearch widget in the module settings. It injects into your theme's search hook automatically.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics panel
diagnostics.description: Test the connection, check last sync time, and see error logs from the module admin panel.

compatibility.title: PrestaShop 8.x compatible
compatibility.description: Tested on PrestaShop 8.0 and 8.1. PHP 8.1+. Works with all major themes.

integrationsBitrixPage.title: 1C-Bitrix integration
integrationsBitrixPage.description: Native 1C-Bitrix module for AACsearch. Sync your catalog automatically with event handlers and background agents.

integrationsBitrix.title: AACsearch for 1C-Bitrix
integrationsBitrix.subtitle: Native Bitrix module with event-driven updates and a background sync agent. No manual exports.

eventHandlers.title: Event handlers
eventHandlers.description: Product create, update, and delete trigger instant sync via Bitrix event handlers. Under 1 second latency.

backgroundAgent.title: Background sync agent
backgroundAgent.description: Bitrix agent runs periodic full sync for reliability. Catches changes missed by event handlers.

catalogSupport.title: Full catalog support
catalogSupport.description: Products, properties, prices, and stock levels. All fields in your iBlock are indexable.

adminPanel.title: Admin settings panel
adminPanel.description: Configure the connector token, index slug, and sync frequency from the Bitrix module settings.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics page
diagnostics.description: Test the connection, check index state, and verify permissions from the Bitrix admin.

support.title: Bitrix Site Manager compatible
support.description: Tested on Bitrix Site Manager and Business editions. PHP 8.1+. Uses standard Bitrix HttpClient.

integrationsRestApiPage.title: REST API integration
integrationsRestApiPage.description: 15 public endpoints with API-key auth. Works with any backend language or platform. OpenAPI 3.1 spec included.

integrationsRestApi.title: Build your own integration
integrationsRestApi.subtitle: If we don't have a native module for your platform, the REST API covers every use case.

endpoints.title: 15 endpoints
endpoints.description: Index CRUD, document CRUD (single + bulk), search, multi-search, analytics, and API key management.

openApi.title: OpenAPI 3.1
openApi.description: Machine-readable spec at /api/v1/openapi.json. Generate a client in Python, Go, Ruby, or any other language.

authentication.title: Bearer token auth
authentication.description: API keys prefixed ss_search_*, ss_connector_*, or ss_scoped_*. Each prefix carries different permissions.

webhooks.title: Outbound webhooks (soon)
webhooks.description: Receive a webhook on sync completion, quota alert, or reindex finished. Currently: Connector API for polling.

rateLimit.title: Rate limit headers
rateLimit.description: X-RateLimit-Limit and X-RateLimit-Remaining headers on every response. Retry-After on 429.

versioning.title: Versioned API
versioning.description: All public endpoints live under /api/v1. Breaking changes get a new version prefix. Old versions kept for 12 months.

integrationsBrowserSdkPage.title: Browser SDK
integrationsBrowserSdkPage.description: A typed JavaScript client for AACsearch. Single search, federated multi-search, facets — under 50ms p99.

integrationsBrowserSdk.title: Search from the browser
integrationsBrowserSdk.subtitle: NPM package. TypeScript types. Works in React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, or plain JS. No backend proxy required.

typedClient.title: Full TypeScript types
typedClient.description: Autocomplete on every method. No guessing response shapes. Types ship with the package — no @types/ needed.

singleSearch.title: Single search
singleSearch.description: search(indexSlug, query, options) → typed results. Facets, filters, sort, pagination — all in the options object.

multiSearch.title: Multi-search (federated)
multiSearch.description: multiSearch([...queries]) → typed results array. One HTTP request, parallel execution, independent facets.

tokenHandling.title: Scoped token support
tokenHandling.description: Initialise with a short-lived scoped token from your server. The SDK attaches it automatically to every request.

errorHandling.title: Typed error handling
errorHandling.description: Typed error objects with slug (search_failed, quota_exceeded, rate_limited). Catch and handle programmatically.

lightweight.title: Under 5KB gzipped
lightweight.description: Tree-shakeable ESM build. Only the methods you import are bundled. No runtime dependencies.

integrationsMcpPage.title: MCP Server integration
integrationsMcpPage.description: Model Context Protocol server for AI agents. Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client can search and manage indexes.

integrationsMcp.title: AI agents that search your data
integrationsMcp.subtitle: The AACsearch MCP Server exposes search, index management, and stats to any MCP-compatible AI assistant.

tools.title: 4 MCP tools
tools.description: search, list_indexes, upsert_document, search_stats — the core operations an AI agent needs over your data.

claude.title: Works with Claude
claude.description: Add the AACsearch MCP server to Claude Code or Claude Desktop. Ask natural-language questions over your indexed data.

cursor.title: Works with Cursor
cursor.description: Cursor's AI features can search your codebase index, documentation, or product data via the MCP integration.

transport.title: stdio transport
transport.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio. Works with any MCP client. No HTTP server required — just point to the binary.

authentication.title: API key auth
authentication.description: Configure with a ss_search_* API key. The MCP server inherits the key's scopes and rate limits.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: The MCP server code is open source. Fork it, extend it, add custom tools for your workflow.

comparePage.title: AACsearch vs The Alternatives
comparePage.description: See how AACsearch compares to Algolia, Elasticsearch, and MeiliSearch — and why thousands of developers choose us.

cta.title: Ready to switch?
cta.description: Migration from Algolia or Elasticsearch takes less than a day with our connector API.

compare.title: The honest comparison
compare.subtitle: We are not the right choice for every team. Here is a frank breakdown of where AACsearch wins and where it does not.

vsAlgolia.title: AACsearch vs Algolia
vsAlgolia.description: Algolia is polished and has excellent docs. AACsearch is cheaper, open-source, and self-hostable. If you are spending $500+/mo on Algolia, AACsearch will cut that significantly.

vsElasticsearch.title: AACsearch vs Elasticsearch
vsElasticsearch.description: Elasticsearch is infinitely flexible and infinitely complex. AACsearch is opinionated and simple. If you need a SIEM or log analytics, use Elastic. If you need product search, use us.

vsMeilisearch.title: AACsearch vs Meilisearch
vsMeilisearch.description: Meilisearch is an excellent open-source engine. AACsearch adds the hosted layer: scoped tokens, multi-tenancy, analytics, and a control plane.

vsTypesense.title: AACsearch vs Typesense Cloud
vsTypesense.description: AACsearch is built on Typesense. We add multi-tenancy, API key management, scoped tokens, and a SaaS control plane on top of the engine.

vsCustom.title: AACsearch vs DIY
vsCustom.description: Building your own hosted search means managing nodes, upgrades, backups, and monitoring. AACsearch does that so you can ship features.

whenNotUs.title: When to use something else
whenNotUs.description: Log analytics → Elasticsearch. Full-text enterprise search with compliance → Coveo. Simple autocomplete on 1K records → don't bother with any service.

compareAlgoliaPage.title: AACsearch vs Algolia
compareAlgoliaPage.description: A detailed comparison of AACsearch and Algolia — pricing, features, self-hosting, and migration.

compareAlgolia.title: AACsearch vs Algolia
compareAlgolia.subtitle: Algolia is the market leader with excellent DX. AACsearch is cheaper, open-source, and adds multi-tenant isolation.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Algolia charges per search operation and per record stored, with minimums. AACsearch charges per search-unit with no minimum beyond the free tier.

selfHost.title: Self-hosting
selfHost.description: Algolia is SaaS-only — you cannot self-host it. AACsearch is self-hostable with the same codebase as cloud.

multiTenancy.title: Multi-tenancy
multiTenancy.description: Algolia uses per-index API keys with user tokens. AACsearch uses HMAC scoped tokens with mandatory AND-combined filters.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: Algolia is closed-source. AACsearch is open source — inspect the code, audit the logic, fork if needed.

migration.title: Migration
migration.description: The AACsearch REST API is structurally similar to Algolia's. A migration script can re-index your data in hours.

verdict.title: When to choose AACsearch
verdict.description: If you are spending $200+/mo on Algolia, or if self-hosting, multi-tenancy isolation, or open source matters to you.

compareElasticsearchPage.title: AACsearch vs Elasticsearch
compareElasticsearchPage.description: Elasticsearch vs AACsearch — when each is the right tool, and what the operational difference looks like.

compareElasticsearch.title: AACsearch vs Elasticsearch
compareElasticsearch.subtitle: Elasticsearch is a general-purpose data platform. AACsearch is a purpose-built search API. Different tools for different jobs.

complexity.title: Operational complexity
complexity.description: Elasticsearch requires cluster management, tuning, and ongoing maintenance. AACsearch is a hosted API — no ops required.

latency.title: Search latency
latency.description: Elasticsearch p99 search latency is typically 100-400ms. AACsearch (Typesense-backed) targets under 50ms p99.

useCase.title: Use case fit
useCase.description: Elasticsearch excels at log analytics, full-text enterprise search, and aggregations. AACsearch excels at product and document search.

cost.title: Cost
cost.description: Elasticsearch on cloud is expensive for pure search workloads. AACsearch pricing is based on search-units — pay for what you use.

schema.title: Schema management
schema.description: Elasticsearch mapping changes are complex. AACsearch has zero-downtime alias-swap reindex — schema changes without downtime.

verdict.title: When to choose AACsearch
verdict.description: If your use case is product search, help center, or SaaS full-text search — and you don't need log analytics or complex aggregations.

compareMeilisearchPage.title: AACsearch vs Meilisearch
compareMeilisearchPage.description: AACsearch vs Meilisearch — engine comparison, hosted layer, multi-tenancy, and when to pick each.

compareMeilisearch.title: AACsearch vs Meilisearch
compareMeilisearch.subtitle: Meilisearch is an excellent open-source engine. AACsearch adds the hosted layer your production deployment needs.

engine.title: Underlying engine
engine.description: Meilisearch is the engine and the product. AACsearch is built on Typesense, a different open-source engine with vector search built in.

hosted.title: Managed cloud
hosted.description: Meilisearch Cloud is their hosted option. AACsearch's hosted layer adds scoped tokens, multi-tenancy, and a management control plane.

multiTenancy.title: Multi-tenancy
multiTenancy.description: Meilisearch's multi-tenancy uses tenant tokens. AACsearch's scoped tokens carry AND-combined mandatory filters for stronger isolation.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Meilisearch has basic search analytics. AACsearch tracks every search event with full metadata: query, filters, latency, CTR.

connectors.title: CMS connectors
connectors.description: Meilisearch has a JavaScript SDK-first approach. AACsearch has native PHP modules for PrestaShop and 1C-Bitrix.

verdict.title: When to choose AACsearch
verdict.description: If you need multi-tenant isolation, a management API, CMS connectors, or analytics beyond basic query counts.

openSourcePage.title: AACsearch open source
openSourcePage.description: The full AACsearch server code is open source. Inspect it, audit it, self-host it, or contribute.

openSource.title: Open source at the core
openSource.subtitle: No proprietary server fork. The code on GitHub is the same code running on managed cloud. Always.

license.title: MIT licensed
license.description: The AACsearch server is MIT licensed. Use it commercially, fork it, modify it — no restrictions.

selfHost.title: Self-hostable
selfHost.description: Docker Compose and Helm chart included. Run AACsearch in your own cloud, on-prem, or air-gapped.

transparency.title: Transparent security
transparency.description: Every security decision is in the open. Inspect how keys are hashed, how tokens are signed, how tenants are isolated.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Issues, PRs, and discussions welcome on GitHub. We review PRs within a week. Contributors get credited in the changelog.

noLockIn.title: No vendor lock-in
noLockIn.description: Your data is always yours. Export indexes, migrate to self-hosted, or switch providers. No proprietary data format.

community.title: Community
community.description: GitHub Discussions for questions, ideas, and show-and-tell. Discord for real-time chat with the team and other users.

developersPage.title: Built for Developers
developersPage.description: A clean API, great docs, and SDKs that get out of your way. AACsearch integrates in minutes, not days.

hero.codeCaption: Add search to your app in 3 lines

features.title: Everything you need to ship search

api.title: REST API
api.description: Clean, intuitive REST API with full OpenAPI 3.1 spec. Every endpoint documented with examples.

sdks.title: Official SDKs
sdks.description: JavaScript and TypeScript SDKs. Community SDKs for Python, Go, and PHP.

browserSdk.title: Browser SDK
browserSdk.description: Lightweight 14KB browser widget. Shadow DOM, 5 locales, analytics built-in. One script tag.

connectorApi.title: Connector API
connectorApi.description: 7-endpoint API for CMS integrations. PrestaShop and Bitrix24 modules included out of the box.

openapi.title: OpenAPI Spec
openapi.description: Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec at /api/v1/openapi.json. Auto-generate client libraries in any language.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Search analytics, zero-result tracking, top queries, and CTR — all in your dashboard.

cta.title: Start building in minutes
cta.description: Free tier included. No credit card required.

aiSearchPage.title: AI-Powered Search
aiSearchPage.description: Go beyond keywords. AACsearch supports vector, hybrid, and semantic search out of the box — no ML expertise required.

vector.title: Vector Search
vector.description: Find semantically similar results even when exact keywords don't match. Uses embedding models to understand meaning.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Search
hybrid.description: Combine keyword precision with semantic understanding. Configurable weights let you tune relevance for your use case.

semantic.title: Semantic Re-ranking
semantic.description: Re-rank results using AI to surface the most relevant hits at the top. Improves CTR without changing your indexing.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Surface relevant products for queries like 'comfortable running shoes' even without exact keyword match.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Let users find answers with natural language questions across your entire knowledge base.

knowledge.title: RAG Pipelines
knowledge.description: Connect AACsearch to your RAG pipeline for accurate, grounded AI responses.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Match buyers and sellers using semantic similarity instead of rigid keyword filters.

upload.title: Upload your data
upload.description: Connect your CMS, database, or upload files via API.

model.title: Choose an embedding model
model.description: Pick from built-in models or bring your own OpenAI embeddings.

index.title: Vectors generated automatically
index.description: AACsearch generates and stores vector embeddings during indexing.

query.title: Query with natural language
query.description: Your users search naturally — AACsearch returns the most semantically relevant results.
